M0530_UR_INCONT_OC (M0530) When Urinary Incontinence Occurs When urinary incontinence occurs. 00 = Timed voiding defers incontinence
01 = During the night only
02 = During the day and night CHAR 2 x x
M0540_BWL_INCONT (M0540) Bowel Incontinence Frequency Bowel incontinence frequency. 00 = Very rarely or never has bowel incontinence
